To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text: I've reviewed the draft for Meridian Group's IT lead — now I'll save a more polished, personalized version back to the same file.

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment – Next Steps for Meridian Group

Dear Priya,

On behalf of the entire NovaBridge team, we are delighted to welcome you and the Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment.

Project Helios is NovaBridge's enterprise data integration platform — purpose-built to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean, reliable data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on dependable live-data pipelines and a seamless path to UAT, we are confident Helios will give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To ensure a smooth start, you will receive your access credentials and detailed onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours.

In the meantime, please see below for our agreed next steps:

1.  Infrastructure Diagram: Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup by Saturday, July 12, 2026.
2.  UAT Environment Access: Meridian team to provision UAT environment access by Saturday, July 19, 2026.
3.  Stakeholder Demo Preparation: We will collaborate to resolve any remaining setup items ahead of our stakeholder demo on Friday, July 25, 2026.

Your Points of Contact:
- For technical questions: Derek Okafor, Technical Lead — d.okafor@novabridge.com
- For project coordination and scheduling: Sarah Chen, Project Manager — s.chen@novabridge.com

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions in the meantime. We truly value the opportunity to partner with you and the Meridian team and look forward to a successful integration.

Warm regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com
